allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f['path']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\('tree',[]\) if f['path'].endswith\('.geojson'\)]")

Bash(node -e "const b = require\('@turf/boolean-point-in-polygon'\); console.log\('bpip type:', typeof b, typeof b.default\); const h = require\('@turf/helpers'\); console.log\('helpers keys:', Object.keys\(h\).slice\(0,8\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const h = require\('@turf/helpers'\); console.log\('has point:', typeof h.point\); console.log\('has feature:', typeof h.feature\)")
Bash(node -e "const g = require\('./manhattan-grid.js'\); console.log\('Count:', g.length\); console.log\('First:', g[0]\); console.log\('Last:', g[g.length-1]\);")
